# UGS Classic (not committed — downloaded by scripts/setup.ps1)

Universal Gcode Sender Classic is downloaded automatically from:
https://github.com/winder/Universal-G-Code-Sender/releases/download/v2.1.23/UniversalGcodeSender.zip

After setup, the JAR lives at:
`vendor/ugs-classic/UniversalGcodeSender/UniversalGcodeSender.jar`
